about.title: About SaúdeFoz
about.paragraph1: SaúdeFoz is an informational project created to help immigrants in Foz do Iguaçu and the Triple Frontier region access Brazil's Unified Health System (SUS).
about.paragraph2: All information comes from official sources of Brazil's Ministry of Health (gov.br) and is updated weekly.
about.paragraph3: This is a non-profit project with no official affiliation to the Brazilian government.
about.disclaimerBody: This website is informational only. It does not replace professional medical care. In case of emergency call SAMU 192 or go to the nearest UPA.
